tasks.instruction: Wybierz poprawna odpowiedz A, B lub C.

items.stem: _________ information we received turned out to be completely inaccurate.
"How was the conference?" -- "Disappointing, actually. _________ of the speakers said anything I hadn't heard before."
_________ child develops at their own pace, so parents should avoid making comparisons.
Life on _________ Mars has fascinated scientists for over a century.
"Is there any milk left?" -- "Only _________. We should get some more."
_________ the students in this class are expected to submit their essays by Friday without exception.
